title: Friend And Foe.
content:
Dearly I love a friend; yet a foe I may turn to my profit;
    Friends show me that which I can; foes teach me that which I should.
meaning:
"Friend And Foe." is a quintessential example of Friedrich Schiller's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
